states.name: Olive
states.title: Reclusive Witchling
states.description:
The witches of Lumains know what it is to be feared, but that doesn't stop them from fearing. Even among outcasts, those witches who have taken on the features of a dragon are shunned. Olive understands why: witches only grow their horns when they've pushed their magic to the brink, losing themselves to the siren song of its power. A dragon witch has shown they're not to be trusted.

She's never told anyone how she got her horns and her lone wing. She's never told anyone how she lost her eye. It wouldn't matter anyway. The truth rarely changes anyone's mind.

states.name: Olive
states.title: Reclusive Witchling
states.description:
Olive doesn't remember many things fondly, but she'll always treasure her mother's laugh. How she made the most delicious pastries. How she studied her spellbooks night and day, desperate to end the Holy Maiden's witch hunts.

It was that desperation that consumed her. Twisted into a dragon, more beast than woman, she attacked her own daughter, the very person she wanted most to save. In that struggle to protect herself, Olive grew her horns. If she hadn't, she doubts she would have survived.

Let the witches whisper that she's just like her mother, a disaster waiting to happen. She knows better than anyone the price of dark magic -- and knows too that sometimes, that price must be paid.
